'''Gno''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as a [[Senator/Legends|senator]] within the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He remained in this role during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], aiding the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] after he was forced to resign. Returning after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] to the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|Senate]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], Gno was a good friend of [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], who had served in the Imperial Senate alongside him for a time.

{{Char-stub}}
